## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` / `chore:` …)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavioural changes
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant
- [ ] Project checks pass locally
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data in the diff
